title: [Codex Improvement] Reduce interaction clarification loops
body:
<!-- codex-improvement:interaction-clarification-loop -->
Run: 2026-03-04-AM

## Trigger
Interaction interrogation detected clarification loops >3 comments.

## Why This Matters
Long comment loops indicate instruction ambiguity and slow delivery.

## Suggested Action
Tighten prompt contracts and enforce ask-vs-decide guidance.

## Evidence
- interactionInterrogation.lastPatternIds includes clarification-loop-control

## Safety
- No direct push to main
- PR-only remediation
